name: Marinus Draconis
lore: When the Primordial Dragon fell, its soul was shattered into six fragments of avatars that would later be referred to as the Dragon Knights, or the Draconis siblings. Marinus is the fourth sibling, wielding the elemental power of water. She commands the crushing weight of the ocean to drown her enemies, eventually ascending into a draconic form of living water to obliterate those who stand in her way.

abilities.name: Abyssal Depth
abilities.details: Marinus gains bonus [ap]magic penetration[/] based on her [mp]maximum mana[/].

abilities.name: Hydro Pump
abilities.details: Marinus channels a high-pressure beam of water in a straight line that impacts the first enemy hit, dealing [ap]magical damage[/] (scaling with [mp]maximum mana[/]) every 0.25 seconds.[n]While casting, Marinus cannot use any other ability but she can rotate her aim and move at a greatly reduced speed. This ability can be held down to continue the blast, rapidly consuming her [mp]mana[/] per second.

abilities.name: Enveloping Mists
abilities.details: Marinus surrounds herself with a layer of mist, gaining a [sh]shield[/] (scaling with [mp]maximum mana[/]) for a few seconds.[n]While Envveloping Mists[/] is active, enemies who strike her with melee attacks or abilities are struck by Corrosion, which reduces their [mr]magical resistance[/] for a few seconds.

abilities.name: Swirling Vortex
abilities.details: Marinus summons a swirling vortex of water at a target location, continously dealing [ap]magical damage[/] (scaling with [mp]maximum mana[/]) to all enemies within the area and lightly [db]pulling[/] them toward the centre of the vortex.

abilities.name: Oceanic Twister
abilities.details: Marinus creates a twister at a target direction, continously dealing [ap]magical damage[/] (scaling with [mp]maximum mana[/]) to all enemies hit and [db]slowing[/] them.[n]If the twister passes through a Swirling Vortex, the vortex will also gain the same [db]slow[/] effect.
